item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 884
item.description:
1

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Adam Huber
"Education is what survives when what has been learned has been forgotten." - B.F. Skinner So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Free Canadian heathcare saved my life
item.description: Canadian here. Came back from a vacation in Italy. The long flight, combined with a pre-existing condition, left me with a blood clot in my leg. Was rushed to the ER. Had tests, saw a specialist, got on meds... long story short, my life was saved (for the 2nd time!) by the incredibly fast and skilled healthcare workers in Ontario. Is Canadian healthcare 'free'? No, we pay for it in taxes. A lot. Is it perfect? Heck no. Ask anyone who lives here. We have problems. BUT, did it literally save my life, and leave me with zero bills afterwards? Yes. I wrote the book ARENA MODE as a love letter to Canadian healthcare after I nearly died 19 years ago. And now, it saved me again. I'm not going to comment on American heathcare because I don't live in the US, so I'm not comparing. I'm just grateful that I live here and have access to this care (or I would no longer be alive... or an Imgurian!!) Take care of your health, stay safe, and if you have access to world class healthcare, be thankful! Love you guys! - Blake TL;DR: Almost died. Didn't. Thank you, Canada. xox
item.dc:creator: BlakeNorthcott

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: Watch as they try and push the progressive movement off the cliff
item.description:
If you don’t know, Jamie Harrison was the Party chair from 2021 to 2025… ya know the time when the party went from controlling both chambers of congress and the White House to now controlling none of them…
“A stronger Democratic Party is part of the job”… but only if you don’t threaten to tax the rich or make working class people’s lives better
The post of Bernie’s he’s responding to if you don’t remember it:
Ultimately, Jamie Harrison is now irrelevant. He’s time was defined by one of the biggest political failures ever. This post isn’t really about him so much as it is to show you that the establishment of the Democratic Party is NOT your ally, and would much rather the progressive fail than succeed, because they serve and always have served the rich. You wanna know why the democrats lose so often? Because they serve capitalism and imperialism first, and only want to give you just enough that you’ll shut up.
Time for a change
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: The Man can’t miss
item.description:
https://www.nytimes.com/2026/06/25/nyregion/nyc-rent-freeze-vote-mamdani.html
Of course the land lords are already whining about it
The man has been in charge all of 6 months. Walked in, and immediately started turning off the baby crushing machines that every liberal could have at any moment and CHOSE NOT TO. If you don’t consider yourself a socialist yet, what are you waiting for?!?

item.title: Tim Sweeney needs to shut the f*ck up.
item.description: https://www.gamesradar.com/games/epic-games-boss-calls-steam-ai-disclosures-really-irresponsible-of-valve-as-they-make-it-much-much-much-harder-for-a-game-developer-to-have-a-chance-of-success/ TLDR Steam requires devs to disclose if AI was used in the development of the games they post on their site/service. Tim Sweeney, the owner of Epic Games and the Epic store, claims this will just hurt sales and small developers. Tim should shut the fuck up. I looked into it and found Steam's Policy. What MUST be Declared: "Any generative AI used to create content that ships with the game." "Any kind of content created with the help of AI tools while the game is running." https://steamcommunity.com/groups/steamworks/announcements/detail/3862463747997849619
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Painted into a corner
item.description: Six months into a caretaker position at a condominium, my boss the property manager wants me to replace old fluorescent light fixtures with the newer LED style. After doing a few I got curious and looked into the regulations on this. Turns out you need to be a licensed electrician. When I pointed this out to her she became immediately hostile and replied with "why are you looking that up". Basically implying I was trying to get out of doing the work. From my understanding a property manager has to take courses on such things. On the first we are going to withdraw from our contract as it has become a hostile workplace. She basically said to us that is why were hired and if the have to get somone else in it will be deducted from out wages. Fuck my life.
item.dc:creator: MrNobodyLivesHere

item.title: Buster Keaton.
item.description: Buster Keaton had Undiagnosed Broken Neck. While filming a water spout scene for Sherlock Jr (1924), Keaton was slammed onto train tracks by a massive torrent of water, fracturing his cervical spine. He completed the film and only discovered the break more than a decade later via an X-ray.
item.dc:creator: iceage2012

item.title: Amphifa
item.description: On Monday night, Trump sat down and posted a photograph of a protester in a giant inflatable frog costume. The frog was labeled "Amphifa." It was holding a sign reading "First they came for the algae." And Trump could not let the frog win. "Here is another example of a crazy pro-algae (likely paid) protestor," he wrote, deadly serious. Every joke at his expense lands like a wound, and he has to swing back at all of them.
item.dc:creator: Detacheddavid
